chunks.title: Crossing the Jordan Begins
chunks.reason: Describes the movement of Israel to the Jordan and Joshua's initial commands to the people and priests.

chunks.title: God's Promise and Instructions
chunks.reason: Combines Yahweh's oracle to Joshua with Joshua's exhortation and specific instructions regarding the miracle.

chunks.title: The Waters Divide
chunks.reason: Narrates the fulfillment of the promise as the priests enter the water and the people cross on dry ground.
